name: audit-pending-spec-fidelity exits two when the --pending folder contains no .json spec files
command: mkdir -p pending/F-4-empty arch && printf 'F-4 minimal\n' > arch/a.md && bash "$CLAUDE_PLUGIN_ROOT/rubric/detectors/audit-pending-spec-fidelity.sh" --pending pending/F-4-empty --arch arch/a.md 2>out.txt; rc=$?; [ "$rc" -eq 2 ] && grep -q 'no specs' out.txt && echo nospecs 1>&2
